posts.author: ChunkyMonkey_72
posts.title: BUTTERTOES XL — this bar is basically a newborn with caramel ankles
posts.body: OK so the clip says it all: my dude is out there doing choreography with a Buttertoes bar so big you could swaddle it. Flavor is stupid good—like butterscotch hugged a peanut and they apologized later. Value? You get MORE FOR YOUR BUCK. Giant more. I'm not saying it's medically advisable to finish one in a sitting; I'm saying it's physically possible and emotionally worth it. Film at eleven.

media.alt: Buttertoes advertisement — dancer with oversized candy bar

seedComments.author: snack_lawyer
seedComments.text: I watched this six times. My attorney advises I buy two.

seedComments.author: ValuMart_Vet
seedComments.text: Finally a bar that respects the concept of quantity. The Fed should study this.

seedComments.author: dialup_dana
seedComments.text: loads.gif still buffering in my soul. worth it.

posts.author: toast_test_lab
posts.title: Samtek 2-slice toaster — uneven browning
posts.body: Center is tan, edges are charcoal. Good if you like surprise. Warranty phone tree is a novella.

posts.author: clean_freak2000
posts.title: CitrusBrite dish soap — cuts grease, kills hands
posts.body: Cleans pans. Smells like a fluorescent lemonade stand. Wear gloves unless you enjoy the texture of parchment.

posts.author: office_drone_17
posts.title: SoundMaster budget headphones — mids are a rumor
posts.body: Treble clicks, bass is a polite suggestion. Fine for conference calls where nobody says anything important.

posts.author: clicky_clacky
posts.title: MicroCorp dome keyboard — sounds like popcorn
posts.body: Tactile enough to annoy coworkers through cubicle walls. Keys yellow after one summer.
